Name: deactivateDepartment
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "deactivateDepartment" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."deactivate_department"($1, $2) AS "_fn_deactivate_department" ORDER BY "joined_at" ASC LIMIT 2) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "_root.base"."department_id" AS "department_id", "_root.base"."is_active" AS "is_active") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
